panels.title: KEDA Operator
panels.description: 1 = healthy & being scraped. Drives every reconcile.

panels.title: Metrics API Server
panels.description: Serves the external.metrics.k8s.io API to HPAs.

panels.title: Admission Webhooks
panels.description: Validates ScaledObject/ScaledJob CRs at apply time.

panels.title: Operator leader status
panels.description: 1 = a KEDA operator pod holds the leader lease. 0 = no leader (reconciles halted).

panels.title: On routable nodes
panels.description: KEDA pods scheduled on a node-routable=true (tainted) node. Should always be 0; KEDA components must stay off routable workload nodes.

panels.title: Admission webhook p99 latency
panels.description: p99 latency of KEDA admission webhook (validates ScaledObject/ScaledJob on apply). Spikes here block kubectl apply; sustained > 1s = investigate.

panels.title: Metrics API server
panels.description: HTTP request rate and latency for the external.metrics.k8s.io API endpoint served by the KEDA metrics-apiserver. Empty if apiserver_request_total is not exposed.

panels.title: Metrics API server request rate by code
panels.description: Rate of external.metrics.k8s.io requests served by the KEDA metrics-apiserver, split by response code. Empty if KEDA metrics-apiserver doesn't expose apiserver_request_total.

panels.title: Metrics API server p99 latency
panels.description: p99 of external.metrics.k8s.io request duration. Empty if KEDA metrics-apiserver doesn't expose apiserver_request_duration_seconds.

panels.title: Paused ScaledObjects
panels.description: Non-zero means autoscaling is suspended on at least one ScaledObject.

panels.title: CRD churn rate
panels.description: Rate of KEDA CR registrations by type. Sustained non-zero with steady total = GitOps loop creating/deleting.

panels.title: Workload outcomes
panels.description: HPA replica state for all KEDA-managed HPAs. Current vs desired vs max replicas.

panels.title: KEDA-managed HPAs — replica state
panels.description: Per KEDA-managed HPA: current vs desired vs max replicas. Filtered by HPA name regex `keda-hpa-.*` (KEDA prefixes all generated HPAs).

panels.title: ScaledObject error rate
panels.description: Rate of keda_scaled_object_errors_total. > 0 sustained 5m fires KedaScaledObjectErrors.

panels.title: Controller reconcile errors
panels.description: Operator-side controller-runtime errors. > 0 for 10m fires KedaReconcileErrors.

panels.title: Adapter ↔ Operator gRPC
panels.description: Traffic on the metrics-apiserver → operator gRPC channel that resolves external.metrics.k8s.io requests for HPAs. Empty for resource-only triggers (CPU/Memory).

panels.title: Server handled rate (operator side)
panels.description: rate of keda_internal_metricsservice_grpc_server_handled_total per grpc_code. Non-OK codes signal adapter requests failing.

panels.title: Client handled rate (adapter side)
panels.description: rate of keda_internal_metricsservice_grpc_client_handled_total. Should mirror server-side traffic.

panels.title: In-flight messages diff
panels.description: msg_received_total - msg_sent_total. Persistently > 0 means responses are stuck.

panels.title: External scalers
panels.description: Populated only when ScaledObjects use external triggers (Prometheus, Kafka, etc.). Resource triggers (CPU/Memory) bypass this path.

panels.title: Active scalers
panels.description: 1 = scaler currently activating (above activationThreshold).

panels.title: Scaler metrics value
panels.description: Current value the scaler reads from the upstream trigger. Compare to the trigger's `threshold` to predict scale decisions.

panels.title: Scaler fetch latency
panels.description: Time the operator spends asking the upstream trigger source. Above 1s for 10m fires KedaScalerMetricsLatencyHigh.

panels.title: Scaler errors rate
panels.description: rate(keda_scaler_detail_errors_total). > 0.1/s sustained 10m fires KedaScalerErrors.

panels.title: Depth
panels.description: > 25 sustained 10m fires KedaWorkqueueBacklog.

panels.title: Operator — CPU throttling
panels.description: Percent of CFS scheduling periods in which the kernel throttled the container. Sustained > 10% means the container is hitting its CPU limit and being slowed down.

targets.expr: 100 * sum by (pod) (rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_periods_total{namespace="platform-keda", container="keda-operator"}[5m])) / sum by (pod) (rate(container_cpu_cfs_periods_total{namespace="platform-keda", container="keda-operator"}[5m]))

panels.title: Metrics API Server — CPU throttling
panels.description: Percent of CFS scheduling periods in which the kernel throttled the container. Sustained > 10% means the container is hitting its CPU limit and being slowed down.

panels.title: Admission Webhooks — CPU throttling
panels.description: Percent of CFS scheduling periods in which the kernel throttled the container. Sustained > 10% means the container is hitting its CPU limit and being slowed down.

panels.title: Pod placement (routable check)
panels.description: Each KEDA pod with its node and routable status. Healthy when all rows show 'non-routable'.

targets.expr: sum by (pod, node, routable) (label_replace(label_replace(kube_pod_info{namespace="platform-keda"} * on(node) group_left(label_node_routable) last_over_time(kube_node_labels[1m]), "routable", "violation", "label_node_routable", "true"), "routable", "non-routable", "label_node_routable", "^$"))

panels.title: Days until cert expiry (min)
panels.description: Minimum days remaining across KEDA cert-manager certificates. Red <7, yellow <30, green >=30.

panels.title: Certs not Ready
panels.description: Number of KEDA cert-manager certificates with Ready != True. Should be 0.

panels.title: KEDA certs — expiry detail
panels.description: Per-certificate expiry, renewal, and Ready status.

panels.title: Days to expiry over time
panels.description: Per-cert days-to-expiry. Lines should jump up at renewal.
